channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Eagles' Super Bowl-winning coordinator Kellen Moore will become the Saints head coach
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Kellen Moore, who oversaw the Super Bowl champion Philadelphia Eagles ' offense this season, has agreed to return to the site of his latest triumph as the next coach of the New Orleans Saints.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Bellingham strikes late for Real Madrid in 3-2 win at Man City in Champions League 1st leg playoff
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Real Madrid’s Galacticos just don’t know when they are beaten. Manchester City just keep on making the same mistakes. Jude Bellingham’s stoppage-time goal sealed a stunning comeback for Madrid and a 3-2 lead in its Champions League playoff against City.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Brandon Ingram gets $120 million extension from Raptors shortly after being acquired
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Brandon Ingram has a $120 million extension from the Raptors before ever playing a game for Toronto. The recently acquired forward agreed to the deal Tuesday, less than a week after the Raptors got him from the New Orleans Pelicans.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Yankees' Boone says he hopes his team would handle title `with a little more class' than Dodgers
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Three months after the World Series, Yankees manager Aaron Boone remained unhappy with some of the Los Angeles Dodgers' remarks after they beat a sloppy New York team in five games for the title.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Goaltending depth is a 'luxury' for the US that could come up big at the 2026 Milan Olympics
item.description: MONTREAL (AP) — When Jeremy Swayman played hockey for the Alaska Jr. Aces and at South Anchorage High School, he did not have a goaltending coach, and his home state did not have a goalie school.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: ESPN star warns Chiefs' Travis Kelce about turning into 'diminishing player' ahead of eventual retirement
item.description: While Kelce did receive Pro Bowl honors for a tenth straight year and remains productive player, he is closer to the end of his football career than the beginning.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NASCAR drivers divided on new rule that could guarantee Helio Castroneves a spot in the Daytona 500
item.description: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — A controversial new NASCAR rule designed for “world-class drivers" could give Helio Castroneves an automatic berth into the Daytona 500, and, should the four-time Indianapolis 500 winner use the provisional, it would make for the largest field in a decade.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Cowboys star CeeDee Lamb sounds off amid teammate Micah Parsons trade rumors
item.description: The Dallas Cowboys 2024 was injury-riddled and disappointing, but star pass rusher Micah Parsons delivered another double-digit sack season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Raiders, Cowboys and Dolphins go another season long removed from their championship days
item.description: HENDERSON, Nev. (AP) — The sayings “commitment to excellence” and “just win, baby” encapsulated what the Raiders represented as they bulldozed their way to three Super Bowl titles with a take-no-prisoners style that endeared and villainized them.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kevin Hart will be the on-court emcee for Sunday's NBA All-Star tournament in San Francisco
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Kevin Hart will be on the court at the NBA All-Star Game. The comedian and actor will be the master of ceremonies for the All-Star Game, a mini-tournament that takes place Sunday in San Francisco.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bengals' Tee Higgins says he'd 'love' to return to Cincinnati ahead of free agency
item.description: Cincinnati Bengals star wide receiver Tee Higgins said he would love to return to the team ahead of his impending free agency, but knows a return is not in his control.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: High school girls basketball rankings Feb. 11, 2025: Bay Area News Group Top 20
item.description: High school girls basketball rankings: Clayton Valley Charter moves up, Mitty, Acalanes and Pinewood remain in the Top 3.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Fan fest in Jersey City will be open for all 104 World Cup matches next year
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A fan fest at Liberty State Park in Jersey City, New Jersey, will be open for all 104 games of the 2026 World Cup. Fan fests with large video screens have been a part of each World Cup's organization since 2006.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Timberwolves sale to Marc Lore and Alex Rodriguez back on track after arbitration ruling
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — The ownership transfer of the Minnesota Timberwolves must continue as originally planned, after a three-person arbitration panel ruled 2-1 that controlling owner Glen Taylor must cede control of the NBA club to partners Marc Lore and Alex Rodriguez in the disputed final phase of t
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UPenn could face civil rights violation after trans athlete ban
item.description: It follows President Donald Trump's executive order banning transgender women from competing in women's sports.
item.dc:creator: Rich McHugh, NewsNation

item.title: Super Bowl halftime performer detained after 'Gaza' flag display
item.description: A performer in Kendrick Lamar's halftime show was detained after displaying a flag with the words "Sudan" and "Gaza"
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Anthony Davis is out with groin strain for second game with Dallas Mavericks amid reports of longer absence
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Anthony Davis has been ruled out of what would have been his second game with the Mavericks amid reports that a groin injury sustained in his Dallas debut could sideline him for multiple weeks.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Here are the top 5 commercials from the Super Bowl
item.description: some people may not have been watching this year’s Super Bowl just for the football or rap superstar Kendrick Lamar’s mid-game performance.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, WGN 9

item.title: Utah HC earns first shootout victory over Capitals
item.description: WASHINGTON D.C. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is carrying a ton of momentum into the Four Nations Break. Karel Vejmelka made 30 saves in relief, and the Utah Hockey Club recovered for a 5-4 shootout win against the Washington Capitals at Capital One Arena on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Eagles beat Chiefs 40-22 in lopsided Super Bowl LIX
item.description: The Kansas City Chiefs wanted to make history with three back-to-back-to-back championships, but Super Bowl LIX was dominated by the Philadelphia Eagles, who won the game 40-22.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: The Latest: Eagles spoil Chiefs' three-peat bid, win Super Bowl 40-22
item.description: Super Bowl 59 kicks off in just a few hours, when the Kansas City Chiefs will face a familiar foe, the Philadelphia Eagles, hoping to win the Lombardi Trophy for a record third year in a row.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Photos: President Trump arrives at Super Bowl LIX in New Orleans
item.description: In addition to the history that may be made on the field, the U.S. will see a first during Super Bowl LIX: a sitting president will be in attendance.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: Super Bowl LIX: Taylor Swift, Travis Kelce spotted out in New Orleans
item.description: New Orleans resident Geoff Jacques said he saw Swift and Kelce as well as Patrick Mahomes and his wife who were with Swift and Kelce.
item.dc:creator: Kenny Lopez, NewsNation

item.title: Clippers dominate fourth quarter in win over Jazz
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - The Los Angeles Clippers broke open a close game in the fourth quarter, outscoring the Jazz 36-24, en route to a 130-110 win over Utah Saturday night. Jordan Clarkson led the Jazz with 24 points, while Keyonte George added 21 off the bench.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Curry scores 34 points, Butler adds 25 in Golden State debut as Warriors rally to beat Bulls 132-111
item.description: Stephen Curry scored 34 points and tied a season high with eight 3-pointers, Jimmy Butler added 25 points in his Golden State debut and the Warriors rallied to beat the Chicago Bulls 132-111 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Devin Booker's 47 points leads Suns past Jazz in OT
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) - Devin Booker scored a season-high 47 points, Grayson Allen hit a 3-pointer at the buzzer to force overtime and the short-handed Phoenix Suns rallied to beat the Utah Jazz 135-127 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ryan Donato stars as the Blackhawks beat the slumping Predators 6-2
item.description: Ryan Donato had two goals and two assists, and the Chicago Blackhawks handed Nashville its sixth straight loss with a 6-2 victory over the Predators on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Tiger Woods will play in Genesis Invitational at Torrey Pines
item.description: Tiger Woods, the host of The Genesis Invitational and an 82-time PGA Tour winner, will play at Torrey Pines Golf Course next week.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Baseball star Shohei Ohtani’s ex-interpreter is sentenced to nearly 5 years in sports betting case
item.description: SANTA ANA, Calif. (AP) — The former interpreter for baseball star Shohei Ohtani was sentenced Thursday to nearly five years in prison for bank and tax fraud after he stole nearly $17 million from the Los Angeles Dodgers player’s bank account.
item.dc:creator: AMY TAXIN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Warriors to trade for Miami's Jimmy Butler: ESPN
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Warriors are finalizing a blockbuster trade for Miami Heat star Jimmy Butler, ESPN reported Wednesday. Butler, 35, also agreed to an extension with the Warriors that will keep him with the team through the 2026-27 season, ESPN said.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: USU hits 20-win mark with 71-67 victory at Wyoming
item.description: LARAMIE, Wyo. (ABC4 Sports) - Coming off its most disappointing performance of the season, a 19-point loss at home to New Mexico, the Utah State basketball rebounded nicely with a hard-fought 71-67 victory at Wyoming Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
